title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 447.030 - Appraiser's list, where filed — publication
text:
447.030.  Appraiser's list, where filed — publication. — The judge shall file such list and the finder shall transmit a copy of the same to the clerk of the county commission within fifteen days, and shall set up at the courthouse door, and four other public places in the township or city, a copy of such valuation within ten days.
(RSMo 1939 § 15319, A.L. 1978 H.B. 1634) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 14229; 1919 § 7289; 1909 § 8270 
Effective 1-02-79
